title: alstonia lenormandii var. comptonii
intro: Alstonia lenormandii var. comptonii, also known as the Compton's alstonia or Chinese alstonia, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family that is native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Alstonia lenormandii var. comptonii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cough and respiratory issues, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
